scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c green,blue "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.demo: concurrently -k -n server,client,browser -c green,blue,magenta "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && open-cli http://localhost:3000"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix server && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.start: cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm run start --prefix server
scripts.serve: npm run build && npm run start
